name: Marilyn's New York-Florida Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. JUST ADD THE INGREDIENTS IN THE ORDER that your bread machine manufacturer requires.
The original recipe called for BETTER for BREAD FLOUR and gluten, neither of which we use.
2. Lately I have been having Papa make it on manual, and then I shape and bake in a LE CLOCHE.
First, while the bread is rising, you soak the entire clay baker.
Then allow it one more rise.
Bake in a COLD oven with the temperature at 450 degrees for about 1/2 hour.
You can do a water or egg wash before you bake and once during baking.
Take the cover off the cooker and let brown for about 10 minutes more,
until you hear a HOLLOW sounding THUMP when you tap on the bread with your knuckles.
